message:
✨ Run Coverage Suite on push to main + add PR blame to failure issues

Changes:
- Trigger on push to main (paths: web/src/**, package*.json, vite.config.ts)
  instead of 2-hour cron — ties failures to specific commits
- Add concurrency group to cancel stale runs when new pushes arrive
- Include commit SHA, author, and originating PR in test-failure issues
- Include same blame info in coverage regression issues
- Drop scheduled cron (push-triggered is sufficient and more actionable)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
